heading: Funeral honors functions at funerals for veterans
label: 12552 Funeral honors functions at funerals for veterans
text: Performance by a Reserve of funeral honors functions at the funeral of a veteran (as defined in ) may not be considered to be a period of drill or training, but may be performed as funeral honors duty under .section 1491(h) of this titlesection 12503 of this title
notes: Amendments2000— inserted period at end.Pub. L. 106–3981999— substituted “honors functions at funerals for veterans” for “honor guard functions: prohibition of treatment as drill or training” in section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Performance by a Reserve of honor guard functions at the funeral of a veteran may not be considered to be a period of drill or training otherwise required.”Pub. L. 106–65
amendments: Amendments2000— inserted period at end.Pub.
